message:
refactor(harness): improve validation manifest error handling and field accessors

Refactor validation_manifest.rs to improve struct field access patterns
and error propagation (26 insertions, 21 deletions). Tightens the
validation runner's manifest parsing to handle edge cases in manifest
entries more robustly. Also syncs beads issue tracker metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-mblr.3.4","title":"No-Mock Critical-Path Enforcement Gate","description":"Add CI assertion that each designated critical path has at least one non-mock, real-backend test lane and that this requirement is reviewed when new critical paths are introduced.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","design":"Drive validation from invariant coverage matrix instead of ad-hoc hardcoded test name lists.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Gate validates each critical invariant/path has at least one non-mock test lane in required CI execution. - Gate blocks changes introducing new critical paths without corresponding non-mock evidence. - Gate report maps each invariant/path to its proving tests for auditability.  5. Comprehensive unit/property tests with deterministic seeds and invariant checks are required for this bead. 6. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script validates integrated behavior with replay instructions and artifact capture. 7. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","notes":"Unparented to make no-mock enforcement workstream actionable before parent closure; feature scope unchanged.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-12T23:24:51.056490827Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T04:28:33.369547765Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.1.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","title":"No-mock critical-path CI gate rule","description":"Enforce CI rule that critical-path verification must be satisfied by real-backend tests, not mock-only suites. Output: auditable rule implementation and failure messaging.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","design":"Implement rule over structured invariant/test mapping generated from bd-mblr.1.3.2 artifacts.","acceptance_criteria":"1. CI rule evaluates non-mock critical-path evidence with deterministic pass/fail semantics. - Rule emits precise failure diagnostics (missing path, expected proving tests, observed evidence). - Rule supports controlled, expiring exceptions with explicit owner metadata.  5. Comprehensive unit/property tests with deterministic seeds and invariant checks are required for this bead. 6. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script validates integrated behavior with replay instructions and artifact capture. 7. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","notes":"Unparented to unblock critical-path CI gate implementation; no reduction in no-mock enforcement requirements.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-12T23:38:08.898484590Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T17:35:30.741586999Z","closed_at":"2026-02-14T17:35:30.741565359Z","close_reason":"Implemented no-mock critical-path CI gate in no_mock_critical_path_gate.rs. 9 tests passing. Unblocks bd-mblr.3.5.1, bd-mblr.3.5, bd-mblr.3.3.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.1.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.2.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.2.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":3003,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## bd-mblr.3.4.1 Completion — No-Mock Critical-Path CI Gate Rule

### Implementation

Created `crates/fsqlite-harness/src/no_mock_critical_path_gate.rs` implementing the blocking CI gate rule that enforces non-mock evidence for critical-path invariants.

### Architecture

The gate cross-references the UnitMatrix with the NoMockEvidenceMap to ensure every invariant in a critical category has at least one non-mock evidence entry.

**Critical Categories** (blocking): SqlGrammar, VdbeOpcodes, StorageTransaction

**Verdict logic:**
- `PASS` — all critical invariants have real evidence
- `FAIL` — one or more critical invariants have no evidence (blocking)
- `PASS_WITH_WARNINGS` — all covered but some via exceptions only

### Evidence: 9 unit tests passing

All quality gates green: cargo check, clippy, fmt.

 {"id":"bd-mblr.3.5","title":"Unified quality evidence rollup and release-readiness gate","description":"Aggregate outputs from coverage/no-mock/unit/e2e/logging gates into a single deterministic release-readiness decision artifact so users can trust that the implementation is fully validated before merge/release.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Program outputs one deterministic release-readiness decision per CI run with pass/fail per required gate family (coverage, no-mock unit, e2e scenario coverage, logging conformance, flake policy). 2. Decision artifact links to machine-readable evidence + human summary and is suitable for automated policy checks. 3. Gate fails closed when required evidence is missing, stale, or contradictory.  5. Comprehensive unit/property tests with deterministic seeds and invariant checks are required for this bead. 6. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script validates integrated behavior with replay instructions and artifact capture. 7. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:34:16.460888968Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T00:37:10.685386012Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2843,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Added to improve user trust and operator ergonomics: implementation can be technically complete but still hard to evaluate quickly. This bead creates a single source of truth proving that comprehensive unit/e2e/logging gates all passed with auditable evidence.","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:34:36Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","title":"Machine-readable validation manifest (coverage + unit + e2e + logging)","description":"Emit one normalized evidence manifest that records gate outcomes, invariant drift status, scenario coverage status, logging conformance status, and artifact references for every required lane.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Manifest schema is versioned and machine-readable, including gate IDs, outcome, timestamp, commit SHA, and artifact URIs. 2. Manifest captures invariant drift, scenario coverage drift, no-mock critical-path status, and logging conformance status. 3. Manifest generation is deterministic and reproducible across reruns for same inputs. 4. Unit and property tests validate schema evolution, required-field enforcement, deterministic ordering, and backward-incompatible change detection. 5. A deterministic e2e scenario script generates the manifest from real CI artifacts and verifies replayability with exact repro commands. 6. Structured logging emits trace_id/run_id/scenario_id, timing, and artifact linkage, and CI enforces logging-schema conformance for manifest generation.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"RoseTiger","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:34:22.911916746Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-15T05:01:03.464249199Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1.1","title":"Manifest ingestion regression: unit+e2e+logging evidence replay","description":"Build a deterministic regression harness that ingests real CI artifacts and verifies manifest completeness for unit, e2e, and logging gates. Include replay-mode validation from archived artifacts so release-readiness decisions remain reproducible.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Harness consumes real CI artifact bundles and verifies manifest entries for unit, e2e, and logging gates with deterministic pass/fail semantics. 2. Replay mode rehydrates decisions from archived artifacts and must reproduce the original gate outcomes. 3. Unit/property tests validate schema parsing, missing-field handling, and manifest evolution rules. 4. E2E script validates full pipeline from CI artifact generation to report drill-down with structured logging and artifact links.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T23:09:20.090431584Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T04:34:59.867289119Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","ev-gated","frankensqlite","logging","manifest","mblr","quality"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-14T04:34:59.867240117Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-mblr.3.5.2","title":"Operator-facing release readiness report with failure drill-down","description":"Generate concise human report summarizing release readiness, blocked criteria, top failing invariants/scenarios, and direct links to detailed artifacts/logs for fast root-cause analysis.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Human report summarizes readiness status, failing gates, and prioritized remediation list. 2. Every failure entry links to root evidence (logs, artifacts, invariant/scenario IDs) for drill-down. 3. Report is compact enough for CI annotation but complete enough for offline triage handoff. 4. Unit/property tests validate report rendering, priority ordering, evidence-link integrity, and stale-artifact detection. 5. Deterministic end-to-end script builds report from a seeded failing run and verifies replay commands plus artifact drill-down paths. 6. Structured logging captures run_id/report_id/scenario_id, generation timing, and failure-context metadata, and CI validates report log schema.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T01:34:23.192828135Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T04:34:59.399272990Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.3.5.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-14T04:22:24.210132619Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-mblr.4","title":"E2E Scenario Completeness","description":"Define and implement a complete end-to-end scenario matrix (DDL/DML/transactions/concurrency/recovery/corruption/compatibility) with deterministic reproducibility and artifact capture.","design":"Scenario completeness should be requirements-traceable, not ad-hoc test accumulation.","acceptance_criteria":"Scenario matrix published with full ownership; missing required scenarios implemented; deterministic replay metadata emitted; failure bundles complete.  Verification contract: this bead is not complete without comprehensive unit/property tests, deterministic end-to-end scenario scripts, and structured logging/metrics validation with replayable artifacts.","notes":"Deferred intentionally for queue hygiene: this bead is a container/coordination umbrella, not a direct implementation lane. Work proceeds through its child tasks; reopen/close this bead during milestone rollup and completion review.","status":"deferred","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-12T23:23:16.914003853Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T04:30:50.772582013Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2844,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Detailed scope: produce an explicit scenario ledger with owning tests and pass criteria. Completion is defined by closure of matrix gaps, not by raw test count growth. Every required scenario must have deterministic replay data.","created_at":"2026-02-12T23:26:03Z"}]}

 {"id":"bd-mblr.5.3","title":"Unified E2E Log Event Schema","description":"Define and enforce a stable event schema across all e2e logs (run_id, test_id, stage, operation, seed, fixture, worker, duration_ms, outcome, error_code, artifact_paths). Ensure backward-compatible parser support in report tooling.","design":"Use strongly typed event contracts plus schema-version tagging to enforce consistency at compile/test time.","acceptance_criteria":"- Unified E2E event schema is versioned, documented, and enforced in emitters/parsers.
- Required fields and allowed optional extensions are explicit and validated.
- Compatibility policy for schema evolution is defined with migration guidance.","notes":"Schema drift is a primary source of triage pain; strict contract governance is mandatory.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-12T23:24:29.299879393Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T19:10:55.676271342Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T19:10:55.676201993Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.5.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.5.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2857,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.5.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Progress update for `bd-mblr.5.3` (schema enforcement integration lane).

Implemented in this pass:
- `crates/fsqlite-harness/src/log.rs`
  - added unified parser support over legacy repro bundles:
    - `parse_unified_log_events(bundle_root)`
    - deterministic projection from `HarnessEvent` -> `e2e_log_schema::LogEventSchema`
    - per-event unified schema validation via `e2e_log_schema::validate_log_event`
  - integrated enforcement into `validate_bundle()` so legacy bundle validation now also checks unified schema compatibility.
  - added deterministic backward-compatible fallback for legacy fail/divergence events without scenario IDs (`LEGACY-0`) to preserve parser compatibility while maintaining strict shape.

- `crates/fsqlite-harness/tests/logging_standard.rs`
  - new regression test `test_repro_bundle_projects_to_unified_schema` validating projection behavior:
    - start event mapping
    - first-divergence marker presence
    - seed propagation
    - single run_id consistency

- `scripts/verify_e2e_log_schema.sh`
  - updated metadata to include `bd-mblr.5.3` in `related_bead_ids`.

Validation evidence:
1) Unit/integration tests
- `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_silverbadger_5_3_1 cargo test -p fsqlite-harness --test logging_standard -- --nocapture`
  - 8 passed, 0 failed
- `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_silverbadger_5_3_1 cargo test -p fsqlite-harness --lib e2e_log_schema -- --nocapture`
  - 17 passed, 0 failed

2) E2E script
- `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_silverbadger_5_3_1 bash scripts/verify_e2e_log_schema.sh --json`
  - result: pass

3) Structured artifact
- `test-results/bd-mblr.5.3-schema-integration-verify.json`
- sha256: `dea302eb5b60813ebcf98d09701c1b927d28adf1f57c6d08303466089f78b51c`

Remaining for full bead closure:
- broader emitter migration and richer canonical field coverage (`test_id/stage/operation/fixture/worker/duration_ms/error_code` surfaces) across all e2e emitters/parsers.
","created_at":"2026-02-13T09:06:43Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-mblr.5.3.1","title":"Unified E2E event schema spec + versioning","description":"Define required event fields, schema versioning rules, and compatibility policy for E2E logs. Output: schema contract document and code constants.","design":"Represent schema in machine-readable form (or typed model) and generate docs/examples from that source.","acceptance_criteria":"- Schema spec defines required fields, types, semantics, and allowed value ranges.
- Versioning policy covers additive vs breaking changes and upgrade behavior for tooling.
- Contract tests validate canonical event examples against schema definitions.","notes":"Schema must include replayability keys (scenario_id, seed, phase, invariant_ids, artifact_paths). Detailed scenario/artifact linkage is finalized during migration/conformance tasks rather than blocking initial schema drafting.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-12T23:38:07.352853263Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T09:00:48.179022839Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T09:00:48.179001960Z","close_reason":"Completed: unified schema/versioning policy constants + contract doc + tests + verify script","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.5.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.5.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2858,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.5.3.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented `bd-mblr.5.3.1` schema/versioning contract slice.

Code/constants delivered:
- `crates/fsqlite-harness/src/e2e_log_schema.rs`
  - added required/replayability constants: `LOG_SCHEMA_MIN_SUPPORTED_VERSION`, `REQUIRED_EVENT_FIELDS`, `REPLAYABILITY_KEYS`
  - added typed field contract metadata (`FieldValueType`, value constraints, semantics)
  - added versioning/compat policy API (`SchemaVersion`, `VersionTransition`, `ToolingCompatibility`, `build_schema_compatibility_policy`, `classify_version_transition`, `evaluate_tooling_compatibility`)
  - added markdown contract renderer + canonical examples + contract tests

Schema contract document:
- `docs/e2e_log_schema_contract.md`

E2E verification script updates:
- `scripts/verify_e2e_log_schema.sh`
  - validates contract doc presence/alignment
  - emits `contract_doc_hash` and contract status in JSON mode
  - tags `related_bead_ids: ["bd-mblr.5.3.1"]`

Verification evidence:
1) Unit/contract tests
- `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_silverbadger_5_3_1 cargo test -p fsqlite-harness --lib e2e_log_schema -- --nocapture`
- Result: 17 passed, 0 failed

2) E2E script
- `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_silverbadger_5_3_1 bash scripts/verify_e2e_log_schema.sh --json`
- Result: pass

3) Structured artifact
- `test-results/bd-mblr.5.3.1-schema-verify.json`
- sha256: `4a5d213521cac94cd89cce28870cf14768abced741f0c3886421ee1c296c6494`

Quality gates (workspace):
- `cargo check --all-targets` passed (with existing warnings)
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` fails on broad pre-existing lint backlog outside this slice
- `cargo fmt --all -- --check` fails due unrelated existing formatting drift in many files/workspaces
","created_at":"2026-02-13T09:00:37Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-mblr.5.3.2","title":"Migrate existing E2E logs to unified schema","description":"Refactor existing log emission points to conform to the schema and remove drift across runners/tests. Output: schema-compliant event stream across entrypoints.","design":"Perform migration by event family, with contract tests per family to catch field regressions immediately.","acceptance_criteria":"- Existing emitters are migrated to schema-compliant event shapes with no ambiguous legacy fields.
- Migration includes translation layer or one-time refactor plan with explicit deprecation timeline.

Changed files:
- e2e/bd_2ddl_compliance.sh
- e2e/bd_sxm2_compliance.sh
- e2e/realdb_integrity_check.sh

What was implemented:
- Added canonical event fields to emitted JSONL events: schema_version, run_id, timestamp, phase, event_type (plus scenario_id/seed/backend/context).
- Added deterministic run-scoped report paths and JSON output summaries with report hashes.
- Preserved existing gate semantics (fail/pass behavior) while normalizing event shape.

Validation evidence:
1) Syntax checks
- bash -n e2e/bd_2ddl_compliance.sh
- bash -n e2e/bd_sxm2_compliance.sh
- bash -n e2e/realdb_integrity_check.sh

2) Script runs
- bash e2e/bd_sxm2_compliance.sh --json
  run_id=bd-sxm2-20260213T091830Z-4167851
  report_sha256=c6d06d261c75ef294240f75785ff2e9e71dcc5371859fadc89e89e5546b8c0d8
- bash e2e/realdb_integrity_check.sh --json
  run_id=bd-3bsz-20260213T091830Z-4167852
  report_sha256=11cbf2c115571ab897b24a0475afd6a2705383b30630340df6f8941b788fb5de
- BD_2DDL_RUN_PER_CRATE_TESTS=0 BD_2DDL_RUN_WORKSPACE_TEST=0 bash e2e/bd_2ddl_compliance.sh --json
  run_id=bd-2ddl-20260213T092408Z-109509
  report_sha256=56544f6e87fde2372a66a0ac97a8b4cbc52d08e4808f68075f056e1903d42357

3) Schema compliance assertions on produced JSONL artifacts
- jq -s all(.[]; has("schema_version") and has("run_id") and has("timestamp") and has("phase") and has("event_type") and allowed phase/event_type enums) passed for all three reports.","created_at":"2026-02-13T09:26:46Z"}]}
